title: Codex session log collector for rich peek
description: Investigate Codex's native session log format and location. Build a session log collector for the Codex adapter that tails Codex's logs for full assistant message text. Emit EventAgentMessage events so peek shows full conversation. This is the main gap between Claude and Codex peek quality.

comments.author: misc-fog
comments.text:
Investigation complete. Findings:

Codex native session logs = rollout JSONL at $CODEX_HOME/sessions/YYYY/MM/DD/rollout-<ts>-<convID>.jsonl. Harness ALREADY discovers this path via SetOnConversationStarted (glob on conversation.id) → sets rc.NativeLogPathSuffix. The gap: nothing tails it. Claude's harness.Start() launches sessionlogcollector.New(path, OnSessionLogLine); Codex's Start() does not.

Assistant text appears in two forms per message: (a) response_item{payload.type=message, role=assistant, content[].output_text} and (b) the flat event_msg{payload.type=agent_message, message, phase}. I'll parse form (b) only (avoids double-emit; stable across codex 0.x versions I checked back to 2026-06-01). phase is 'commentary' | 'final_answer' — emit both (matches Claude emitting all assistant text blocks). Skip user_message/token_count/task_*/reasoning.

Wiring: path is discovered async (unlike Claude's launch-time path), so Start() will wait on a channel fed by the conversation-started callback, then tail. Resume → NewTailOnly to avoid replaying prior conversation. Emitted EventAgentMessage flows internalCh→Start→monitor→eventstore→peek (peek already renders EventAgentMessage). TDD next.

comments.author: misc-fog
comments.text:
Implementation done + pushed (commit 9ed474d on misc-fog/codex-session-log-collector).

What shipped:
- codex/event_handler.go: parseCodexSessionLine + OnSessionLogLine — parses event_msg/agent_message rollout lines → EventAgentMessage (commentary + final_answer). Parses the flat event_msg form only (not the duplicate response_item/message) so each message emits once.
- codex/harness.go: Start() launches a tailer that waits on sessionLogPathCh (fed by the existing conversation-started glob callback), then tails via the shared sessionlogcollector. Resume → NewTailOnly. Mirrors the Claude harness pattern.
- codex/session_log_test.go: 8 unit tests (agent_message, commentary, user_message/response_item/token_count/empty/invalid → no emit, tailer end-to-end) + a full harness-integration test (real OTEL conversation_starts → glob → tail → EventAgentMessage).

Verification:
- All codex + eventstore + peek FormatAgentEvent tests pass; make check (vet/staticcheck/gofmt) clean.
- Real-data parity: ran parser over an actual 2690-line rollout — emitted 165 messages, exactly matching jq's ground-truth count of non-empty agent_messages.
- Full 'make test': only failures are TestQAAuth_Integration / TestRunQASetup_Integration (Docker QA integration flakes, 60s timeouts, zero references to my change areas) — pre-existing, unrelated.

Ready for review. Waiting on a reviewer before close.

comments.author: misc-fog
comments.text: REVIEW-PENDING: Initial implementation complete and pushed (commits 9ed474d + b030170). Routed to reviewer-fog for code review (per concierge-fog). Not closing until reviewer-fog approves. Will incorporate any findings and re-request review as needed.
